titleStmt.title: SII 37.135: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 135. (A.R. No. B 6 of 1940.) Cheṇḍuvāyi, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the temple of Ellamma.
This is dated Śaka 1694, Nandana, Chaitra, śu. 15, corresponding to 1772 A.D., April 17, Friday.
It records the gift of land by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇams of the village to the village goddess Ellamma situated on the banks of the river Pinākini and the god Mallēśvara of Kumāragiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā .
svasti śrī vijayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kavarṣaṁbbulu 1694 Agunē
ṭi naṁdananāma saṁvvacara cai
tra śu 15 lu . ceṁḍuvāyama
hastaḷamaṁdu pinākini
tīravāsurālayni Ā
raṁ jyōti svarūpamaina tamadai
vaṁ yallaṁmmaku grāma Adhikāri
reḍḍikaraṇālu taḷiha dīpārādhanaku
yiccina bhūdāna patrike . nāgaṁvāri pa
lleku nairutabhāgāna pellayettu
ku 1 . maḍi dovula dakṣaṇa
ṁku 1 . kūrmagiri mallēśvaruniki maḍi yallaṁ
mma bhāvivuttaraṁ nāgaṁ pedayyatiyi
ccina gaḍḍatiru . yiccināmu yiṁdku
yavaru Ākṣēdana ceśinā kāśilō gō
hatya braṁhmatya śrīhatya cēśina pā
pāna poṁdduduru turkalu Ācedana ce
śirainā makkālō paṁddini tinnaṭṭu
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācreyōnupā
lanaṁ dānasvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
padaṁ . gaḍḍa tiru 2 staḷāluku 3 ke nāgaṁ pedayya
124 karaṇālu vi mūraṁreḍḍi rāmanna . 24 kuḍa
malayallappa vi voḍḍeśidduvi vubhayaṁ 16
visālu
Digital edition of SII 37.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
